scripts.dev: set NEXT_DISABLE_SWC_NATIVE=1&& npx -y node@22 node_modules/next/dist/bin/next dev
scripts.build: set NEXT_DISABLE_SWC_NATIVE=1&& npx -y node@22 node_modules/next/dist/bin/next build
scripts.start: set NEXT_DISABLE_SWC_NATIVE=1&& npx -y node@22 node_modules/next/dist/bin/next start
scripts.lint: set NEXT_DISABLE_SWC_NATIVE=1&& npx -y node@22 node_modules/next/dist/bin/next lint
scripts.db:generate: node -e "console.log('No generation step required for hosted JSON document store.')"
